← All Mockups

Mobile Preview Hub

Every surface, at iPhone width

All five v33.0 surfaces previewed inside iPhone frames. Tap any frame to load that mockup live (lazy-loaded to keep memory in check). Tap "Open full size" to view in a full mobile-sized browser tab.

How to read this page. Each iPhone shell shows a placeholder until tapped. Tapping loads the live mockup as an iframe inside the shell at iPhone width (340x720). This is a memory optimization: previously all five frames loaded on page open and shared their canvas RAF loops, ballooning Safari's per-origin memory. Now only the frames you tap consume resources. For the most accurate test, visit the linked URLs in Safari on a real iPhone.

i.

Welcome modal

Full-bleed on mobile. Brilli at 180px. CTA expands to 80vw, sits above safe-area-inset-bottom.

Welcome modal
Tap to load →
Lazy-loaded for memory
Open full size →

ii.

Launch screen

Brilli at 200px. Wordmark scales via clamp. Loader pulse 32px above safe-area home indicator.

Launch screen
Tap to load →
Lazy-loaded for memory
Open full size →

iii.

Liquid-nav

Mobile has no sidebar. The 50px liquid-nav pill is the equivalent. Brilli status dot at left edge.

Liquid-nav
Tap to load →
Lazy-loaded for memory
Open full size →

iv.

/info mobile

Hero stacks vertically. Two-col grids collapse. Cross-mode arrow rotates 90deg.

/info mobile
Tap to load →
Lazy-loaded for memory
Open full size →

v.

Brilli prototype

Stage and controls stack vertically. Canvas scales to 320px max. Mode buttons in 2-col grid.

Brilli prototype
Tap to load →
Lazy-loaded for memory
Open full size →
Note on Brilli's form. Per the spec, the canvas module is implementation-flexible. Whether Brilli stays a firefly, becomes an orb, or takes another form, the surfaces above all keep their layout. The Brilli area is sized predictably at each viewport and can host any silhouette without rebuilding the surrounding screens.

Brilliance · by RoweOS · v33.0 mobile preview · all mockups index
